---
title: "Presentation Graph"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(lmerTest)
library(knitr)
load("data/processed/lmmdata.RData")
```

```{r}
model_all = lmer(zhfa ~ as.factor(chsex) + 
                   time +
                   drwaterq_new + 
                   as.factor(chsex) * time + 
                   as.factor(chsex)*drwaterq_new + 
                   time*drwaterq_new + 
                   age_first_c + 
                   (1|childid),
                 data = ethiopia_df)
sf = summary(model_all)
kable(as.data.frame(sf$coefficients))
```
